# Assignments

You can check out the links to the assignments here. Each assignment will be assigned to you through github classroom.

  * [Lab 1: ROS 2 (Individual)](/ESE6150-Website/assignments/01_ROS2) **[__](https://github.com "Github Link")**
  * [Lab 2: Automatic Emergency Braking](/ESE6150-Website/assignments/02_AEB) **[__](https://github.com "Github Link")**
  * [Lab 3: Wall Following](/ESE6150-Website/assignments/03_WallFollow) **[__](https://github.com "Github Link")**
  * [Lab 4: Follow the Gap](/ESE6150-Website/assignments/04_FollowTheGap) **[__](https://github.com "Github Link")**
  * [Lab 5: SLAM & Pure Pursuit](/ESE6150-Website/assignments/05_SLAM_PP) **[__](https://github.com "Github Link")**
  * [Lab 6: Motion Planning](/ESE6150-Website/assignments/06_RRT) **[__](https://github.com "Github Link")**
  * [Lab 7: MPC](/ESE6150-Website/assignments/07_MPC) **[__](https://github.com "Github Link")**
  * [Lab 8: Perception & Vision](/ESE6150-Website/assignments/08_Vision) **[__](https://github.com "Github Link")**
  * [Debate: Ethics](/ESE6150-Website/assignments/09_Ethics) **[__](https://github.com "Github Link")**
